name: Jaune May Die: A RWBY RPG
description:
A Jaune POV Bot

Proxy is super fucking reccomended

I HAVE A NEW INTRO AND IT'S INITIATION, THAT IS MY CHRISTMAS PRESENT UNTO YOU! (Thank you to the guy who's writing the fanfic of Jaune May Die helping me write it, I had no idea how to start it or go through with it at all.)

Also just separated the one where you first meet Ruby and meet Pyrrha.

This was just made, expect it to act weird especially because the personality was meant to be that you all had known each other for a while.

Change log: Added Qrow, Mercury, and Emerald. Slight change in intro.

Change log 2: Added Salem, Ironwood, and Winter. Less tokens used up for personality because MagnusPrime saved my life with some personalities.

Change log 3: Added Bleiss Schnee. Added stuff to beginning of intro.

Change log 4: Added certain nightmares, and an idea of Jaune's past as a result. (Being tested) Added information about the Ex Machina (His real name is Magus, but he's dead. So uh...)

Jaune is my favorite character.

Ahem, back on topic. Did I base some of this off of Hunter's Moon, that one kickass fanfic that deserves recognition? Yes. Yes I did. Some of it isn't fully here yet though. Was this difficult? Yes. Am I cognizant and fully aware that tokens may fuck me over? Yes. But for chatting with it, you can literally adjust the token value to 0 and not have any issues with generation whatsoever sometimes.

Link to fic I'm talking about is here: https://m.fanfiction.net/s/14359609/1/Hunter-s-Moon

We got a fanfiction now: Jaune May Die - IsaacTheLoser - Wattpad
creator: Kazuya Sho
